zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Battell於1378年出生在英國艾可奧加時，她的父親Thomas Battell Barrington45歲，母親Elizabeth Enfield31歲。她於1398年與John Barentyne結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1464年12月21日在英國艾可享年86歲。

nameMeanings.name: Battell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Battle
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from Old French de la bataile ‘(man) of the battle-array; warrior’. This name was taken to Scotland by a family from Umfreville, France, in the early 13th century.
Irish (Sligo and Mayo): adopted for Mac Concatha, ‘son of Cú Chatha’ a personal name meaning ‘hound of battle’ (where con is genitive of cú ‘hound’ + cath ‘battle’).
History: A John Battle from Yorkshire, England, settled in 1654 on the Nansemond, a stream in VA. His descendants became prominent in NC and GA.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Battell was born in 1378, in Ongar, Essex, England, her father, Thomas Battell Barrington, was 45 and her mother, Elizabeth Enfield, was 31. She married John Barentyne in 1398. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 21 December 1464, in Essex, England, at the age of 86.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Battell родилась в 1378 г. в местности онгар, эссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas Battell Barrington было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Enfield, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Barentyne в 1398 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 21 декабря 1464 г. в местности эссекс, Англия в возрасте 86 лет.
